programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Starsky and Hutch are assigned to escort the daughter of a crime boss from San Francisco to Los Angeles but a security leak has unleashed hordes of hit men that they must evade en route

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Archangel is held captive by a powerful arms dealer who needs information to complete the work on a highly advanced maneuvering system for fighter jets - Fortune Teller With the help from a psychic String and Dom endeavor to find their friend before its too late

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A native American doctor discovers a unique way to cure terminally ill patients but the price of the treatment is murder

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: The Fastest Gun Alive
programme.desc: In the western frontier town of Cross Creek storekeeper George Temple is a polite and soft spoken man with a secret past When 3 bank robbers on the lam stop in town to change horses Georges past comes back to haunt him

programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A cowboy detective goes up against a gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: Broken Arrow

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur lands in a Mexican jail and Mister Ed is the only crime witness that can help to set him free

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Eds mother is being used as a plow horse so he begs Wilbur to buy her at auction Carol is dead set against taking in another horse and Roger is dead set against Kay spending any of his money at the auction

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Rifleman

programme.title: Gunsmoke S07E09 Milly
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S07E09 Milly

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cartwrights deal with cattle rustlers

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: President Grant beset by problems recalls his top troubleshooter James West to service West and his partner Artemus Gordon must discover why Juan Manolo has staged a series of raids in the southwest territories Sending the army might cause a war but a pair of low key troubleshooters might be able to solve the problem

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday Gannon talk to community members to improve relations between police and public They suggest people call them to find the truth of incidents instead of spreading rumors A couple complains they were stopped because of their race

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble works as a laundryman for an amiable fellow named Charlie who knows too much about the wrong people who are out to kill him He has arranged for his girlfriend to come join him not realizing she may bring the Mob with her

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: An old flame comes back into Mikes life and shes nothing but trouble

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike has been hired to test a machine dubbed the fish-finder on an experimental boat called The Sonar Queen in hopes of determining why all of the fish have disappeared from the coast of a Mexican fishing village

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A model desperate for fame hooks up with a crazed fashion photographer

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Overbearing control freak Jeremy and his long-suffering wife Julie are a squabbling young rich couple who encounter unexpected trouble in the form of a scruffy biker and his pregnant girlfriend while embarking on a road trip to Sunnyvale Can a surprise journey through time enable the obsessive Jeremy to successfully avert a tragic disaster

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric jumps a train in his quest for Skorzeny He finds a band of hobos who are suspicious of him when one of their members has his throat slit while they sleep

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: When a werewolf murders some homeless kids Eric tracks it to a mall and finds a homeless girl living there He runs out of silver bullets and fashions a silver crossbow arrow slaying the werewolf Only to find that its the homeless girl

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: To apprehend a murderer who is supposedly killing in the name of God Nick must overcome his vampire fear of the cross

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Two young antique store owners must recover cursed antiques

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A groom to be gets a lesson in monogamy from the stripper from hell at his bachelor party and then his bride is overwhelmed with suspicion and mistrust and busts married men who cheat due to having caught her father step-out on mom when she was a child

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Young woman Suzy looks out of the window of her apartment and witnesses a man murdering a woman in the apartment directly across from hers Suzy is so traumatized by what she sees that shes rendered mute Suzy is placed in the care of Dr Trask who alas turns out to be the man who committed the murder she witnessed

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A TV shock journalist gives an on-air tour of an eerie haunted house

programme.title: Smart 423
programme.desc: Smart 423

programme.title: Smart 424
programme.desc: Smart 424

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ helps a pregnant lady who has some very incriminating evidence against the evil sheriff Nathan McCandles on Christmas Eve

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gives away Ed to a prospective client in order to secure a home architecture job

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Eds having paternal feelings so he talks Wilbur into adopting a little pony as a son for him

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for 1000000 in diamonds but can he be trusted

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Efforts to aid a Nazi generals assassination plan hit a snag when Schultz unknowingly activates a time bomb meant for the Führer

programme.title: Mchale 329
programme.desc: Mchale 329

programme.title: Mchale 306
programme.desc: Mchale 306

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers favorite actress visits the base

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer gets assigned to MP duty

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The hungry castaways find a wild duck on the island but they dont know whether to use it as food or attach a message to him and hope for rescue

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans Christmas wish appears to be coming true when a radio broadcast tells them their rescue is imminent While they wait they recall the first days on the island when Gilligan lost the radio and transmitter

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The entire family begins to pamper Grampa - much to his displeasure

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Luke fears that he may be losing his hair Grandpa employs an unusual tactic to remind Luke that appearances arent as important as he thinks

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Leslies cousin is about to be wed and has set her lustful sights on next-door Kirk for some passion in her life

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: An aging unfunny comic who is an old friend of Dicks uses the Stratford to jump start his career despite Joannas objections

programme.title: Major 124
programme.desc: Major 124

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: An impostor posing as Mr Howell claims to having been rescued and begins selling off Mr Howells stocks The real Mr Howell offers his fellow castaways a hefty reward to get him off the island and save his fortune

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Rene and RJ OGill two step-children of a recently widowed man hire Mitch to protect them for they suspect that their step-father Robert Houston murdered their mother for her money Both Rene and RJ will inherit a trust fund on Renes 25th birthday which is only a week away

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Reach For the Sky
programme.desc: Biopic of RAF Group Captain Douglas Bader who after having lost both legs flew a British fighter plane during WWII

programme.title: Miracle of the White Stallions
programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: While examining Maels ship Liam and Renee find a chamber and in it are some life pods and the persons are all dead except for one He awakes and reveals himself to be from Ancient Rome and he was chosen by Mael to deal with the Taelons if they chose not heed Maels telling them not to come to Earth At the same Tathan decides to challenge Zoor for the right to lead the Synod and Zoor decides to get an advantage by using Sandoval

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A noted scientist and old friend of Suzannes Dr Erik Von Deer is being brain-washed through signals subliminally implanted in the music of his favorite artist into secretly working on a serum that will give the aliens immunity to Earths bacteria Suzanne arrives for a weekend visit while Von Deer is on the verge of the serums completion

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A sickly stranger claiming to be Tressas long-lost brother appears at the Langford house

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim befriends a little girl with volatile behavior

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: When a ship carrying a prisoner lands at Moonbase Alpha after asking for assistance Maya insists that the prisoner is a poet and not a murderer and releases him

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hughie Hogg returns with his eye on the office of Hazzard County Sheriff He blackmails his Uncle Boss into supporting his campaign by threatening to take secretly taken photographs of his criminal activities to the FBI Coy and Vance decide to support incumbent Rosco while they collect enough evidence to derail Hughies campaign and run him out of town

programme.title: Hercules 108
programme.desc: Hercules 108

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Two Gunsmoke writers teamed on this modern-day Western set at a rodeo in San Franciscos Cow Palace A bronc rider dies in what appears to be an accident A rodeo clown looks around the scene after the police leave and discovers the riders rope -- which was cut almost halfway through before it broke leaving the bronc free to throw him The police come back to investigate the scene and before long the chief suspect is also murdered in another accident

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Briggs poses as an American tourist and subjects himself to a show trial in order to discredit a public prosecutor attempting to seize absolute power in his country

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Lana is happy to be reunited with her long-lost brother Lyle on the distant video world of Tetris Kevin and Lyle join forces to stop Mother Brain from taking Tetriss power source the Sacred Square

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: A football game against Dr Wilys robot masters brings acquaintances of Kevin from high school to Videoland The N team ought to play good and win because the prize is the throne of Videoland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Sheila saves a girl named Karina from a magic trap but Karina turns evil Meanwhile the kids are looking for a pair of magic rings that might send them home not realizing that Karina has one of the rings

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids encounter a race of tiny friendly dragons who are being hunted by an evil king By saving the dragons they may find their way home

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain go to an Old Wild West amusement park to stop a MAD plot to make the park their new headquarters

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents sabotage a US space shuttle by planting a bomb on board Inspector Gadget foils MADs plans and saves the space shuttle Safety Tip Breakfast is the most important meal of the day
